name: basecamp-mcp
description: Basecamp tools for Claude — browse projects, todos, documents, and messages via the Basecamp CLI.

basecamp_account_id.title: Basecamp Account ID
basecamp_account_id.description: Your Basecamp account ID. Find it with: basecamp accounts list --json

basecamp_path.title: Basecamp CLI path (optional)
basecamp_path.description: Full path to the basecamp binary. Auto-detected if blank. Run 'which basecamp' in Terminal to find it.
